privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Umut Ajans we value our visitors' privacy. This privacy policy explains what information is collected when you visit our website and how it is used.
privacy.collectedIntro: When you use our website, the following information may be collected:
privacy.collectedNote: This information is used only for communication and service delivery purposes.
privacy.usageIntro: Collected information may be used for the following purposes:
privacy.cookiesText: Our website may use cookies to improve user experience. Cookies are small data files stored on your device by your browser.
privacy.securityText: The security of user information is important to us. Therefore, data is stored on secure infrastructure and protected against unauthorized access.
privacy.thirdPartyText: Our website may use analytics tools such as Google Analytics or other third-party services. These services are subject to their own privacy policies.
privacy.contactText: You can contact us with any questions about our privacy policy.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By using this website, you are deemed to have accepted the following terms of use.
terms.servicesText: Umut Ajans provides digital marketing, design and print services. Information on the website is for informational purposes only.
terms.contentText: All content, design, text and images on the website belong to Umut Ajans. They may not be copied, distributed or used for commercial purposes without permission.
terms.disclaimerText: We strive to keep the information on the website as accurate and up to date as possible. However, no guarantee is given as to the accuracy or completeness of the information.
terms.linksText: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. Umut Ajans is not responsible for the content of these sites.
terms.changesText: Umut Ajans reserves the right to update these terms of use at any time.

cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to improve your experience and for analytics. By continuing you accept our use of cookies. See our privacy policy for more.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: As the Umut Ajans website, we would like to inform you about our use of cookies and how they are managed.
cookies.whatText: Cookies are small text files stored on your device (computer, tablet or mobile) by websites. They are used to ensure the site works properly, remember user preferences and improve the site experience.
cookies.typesEssentialDesc: Required for the basic functionality of the site.
cookies.typesAnalyticsDesc: Help us understand visitor behaviour and improve the site.
cookies.typesFunctionalDesc: Allow us to remember your preferences such as language or region.
cookies.manageText: You can delete cookies or block certain types of cookies from your browser settings. Some features of the site may not work properly if you disable cookies.
cookies.contactText: You can contact us with any questions about our cookie policy.
